message:
fix: add error logging in done.go and file locking in curator.go (gt-i8yi8, gt-s6xvl)

- Replace silent error discards (_ =) for LogDone() and LogFeed() with
  style.PrintWarning calls so failures appear in session output
- Add warnings for silent early-return paths in updateAgentStateOnDone()
- Add flock.RLock() to readRecentFeedEvents() to prevent partial reads
  when concurrent writers are appending to the feed file

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
